name: GOLFTEC Malvern
about: GOLFTEC Malvern is a golf training and fitting studio that provides data-driven instruction and club fitting services. The facility utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching. Lessons are designed for various skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, focusing on swing analysis and improvement. The studio also offers club fitting services that use launch monitors and shaft optimization to match players with custom-fit equipment from top brands.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced motion capture technology
Personalized coaching with certified PGA professionals
Custom club fitting with launch monitor data for optimized performance
Access to training bays with launch monitors and video feedback
Structured lesson plans for long-term improvement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use equipment provided at the facility. For club fitting sessions, you'll be fitted with new clubs based on your swing data.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session, but practice sessions are designed to be structured with coach guidance.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While not specifically mentioned, the training environment appears geared toward serious practice and instruction, so it may be more suitable for older juniors or adults.
